diagrams.title: Inheritance Hierarchy with Pointers
diagrams.description: Shows how base class pointer can point to different derived class objects
elements: Arrows showing pointer can hold addresses of any derived object
diagrams.purpose: Visualize polymorphism concept - single pointer referencing multiple object types

diagrams.title: vtable and vptr Mechanism
diagrams.description: Illustrates how virtual function calls are resolved at runtime
elements: Dynamic dispatch arrow showing runtime lookup
diagrams.purpose: Understand the internal working of virtual functions and dynamic binding

diagrams.title: Object Slicing Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates what happens when derived object is assigned to base object by value
elements: Derived object with Base + Derived parts
Sliced result showing only Base portion
Lost Derived portion shown as 'sliced off'
diagrams.purpose: Understand why object slicing destroys polymorphic behavior

diagrams.title: Upcasting vs Downcasting
diagrams.description: Shows direction of casting in inheritance hierarchy
elements: Explicit cast shown for unsafe downcast
diagrams.purpose: Visualize casting directions and safety implications
